items.title: Solana Exchange Stabble Warns Users to Pull Liquidity After North Korean Hacker Scare
items.summary: A decentralized exchange on Solana urged its users to exit after a former executive was alleged to be a North Korean hacker.

items.summary: The FDIC’s proposal establishes federal oversight standards for stablecoin issuers while explicitly excluding tokens from deposit insurance protections.
